features: Compatibility: Shockproof case for iPad Mini 5th/4th Generation 7.9 inch 2019/2015 released, Model (A2133 / A2124 / A2125 / A2126 / A1538 / A1550). NOT compatible with iPad Air/Pro Series or any other models

3-in-1 Protective Case with Screen Protector: This case for iPad Mini 7.9 inch is designed with anti-shock material, with hard PC frame, soft silicone skin and anti-scratch screen protector, to create the full-body protection case for your iPad Mini 5th/4th Generation. Not only shockproof/long-lasting but also comfortable holding feel

360° Rotating Stand & Adjustable Hand Strap: The rotatable stand can provide multi-angle support, allowing you to flexibly choose a more comfortable viewing/typing/drawing angle. With soft hand strap, you can hold your tablet securely with one hand and use it at any angle, convenient for meetings or traveling

Multifunctional Carrying Strap: The shoulder strap for iPad Mini 5/ Mini 4 case is adjustable and detachable, convenient for both kids and adults to carry the Mini 7.9'' case during hiking, traveling or other outdoor activities. And you can also hang it anywhere to free your hands for better enjoyment

Precise Cutouts & Pencil Holder: Easy access to all buttons, controls and ports without having to remove the case for iPad Mini 5th/4th Generation. Built-in pencil holder helps keep your stylus in place for handy use (Stylus is NOT included)

COMPATIBILITY: ONLY for iPad Mini 5th/4th Generation 7.9 inch 2019/2015 released, Model: A1538/ A1550/ A2133/ A2124/ A2125/ A2126. Notice: NOT COMPATIBLE WITH iPad 5th/4th Generation / iPad Pro 5th/4th Generation or any other model. 3-in-1 Protective Case with Screen Protector Top: 2 Solid Front Covers for your options (One with Screen Protector, Another without). Center: Non-Slip Hard Shell with Rotating Kickstand / Hand Strap. Bottom: Soft Shock-Resistan Silicone Skin. Full Body Protection design, keep your iPad Mini 5/4 safe from accidental drops, shocks and scratches. Adjustable Kickstand The kickstand can be rotated 360 degrees. Keep your iPad Mini 5/4 standing steady and help free your hands. And provide more flexible and comfortable angles for your viewing or typing, ideal for watching videos, office working and class learning. 360° Rotating Hand Strap The adjustable/rotatable handle strap is made from premium soft fabric, fit for kids/adults, comfortable to hold the center gravity of iPad Mini 5th/4th Generation. Built-in Pencil Holder & Kids-friendly Design The stylus pencil holder enables you to keep your Pencil in place for handy use. ( Notice: The pencil is NOT included! ) Practical built-in stand, suitable for various occasions such as office work, classroom teaching/learning, leisure and entertainment, and home exercise. 360 degrees rotating hand strap and portable shoulder strap makes it more convenient for you to use and carry your iPad Mini 5th/4th Generation. Previous page Next page 1 Rotating Hand Strap 2 Detachable Shoulder Strap High-Quality Protection Is What We Are Strongly Committed To This iPad Mini 5th/4th gneration case is of corners thicken design & enhanced camera protection, effectively keeps your iPad away from damages of drops, bumps, shocks or scratches. Its excellent safety performance prolongs the lifetime of your iPad Mini 5 and iPad Mini 4.
